name: agent-builder
description: Design and evaluate agentic harnesses with research synthesis, prompt contracts, and an architecture catalog

interface.shortDescription: Design and evaluate agentic harnesses with research synthesis, prompt contracts, and an architecture catalog
interface.longDescription: Cross-LLM skill for designing, evaluating, and improving agentic harnesses. Agent Builder research synthesis, reusable templates, Prompt Builder prompt contracts, and an empirical catalog covering architectures, frameworks, memory substrates, lab patterns, and local/open-source model agents.
